# katapult_object_storage_account (Data Source)

Look up the object storage account for an organization in a given region.

Useful when another Terraform configuration manages the
`katapult_object_storage_account` and you only need to reference
its `id` to attach buckets or access keys without managing the
account itself.

If you also manage the account in the same configuration, reference the
resource directly instead of going through this data source.

Use this data source to reference an object storage account managed by
another Terraform configuration (or enabled via the Katapult dashboard) when
you want to attach `katapult_object_storage_bucket` or
`katapult_object_storage_access_key` resources without taking lifecycle
ownership of the account itself.

If you also manage the account in the same configuration, reference the
resource directly via
[`katapult_object_storage_account.<name>.id`](../resources/object_storage_account.md)
instead — the resource's attributes are always in sync with the plan.

If no account exists for the given region, reading the data source fails
with a "not found" error rather than producing an empty result.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "katapult_object_storage_account" "main" {
  region = "uk-lon-1"
}

resource "katapult_object_storage_bucket" "assets" {
  name                      = "my-org-assets"
  object_storage_account_id = data.katapult_object_storage_account.main.id
}
```

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "katapult_object_storage_account" "main" {
  region = "uk-lon-1"
}

# Attach a bucket to the existing account without managing the account
# resource in this configuration.
resource "katapult_object_storage_bucket" "assets" {
  name                      = "my-org-assets"
  object_storage_account_id = data.katapult_object_storage_account.main.id
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `region` (String) Region permalink, e.g. `uk-lon-1`. Defaults to `uk-lon-1`.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Account identifier — the region permalink.
- `provisioning_state` (String) Current provisioning state of the account: `provisioning`, `provisioned`, or `failed`.

## Related Resources

* [`katapult_object_storage_account`](../resources/object_storage_account.md)
  resource — manage an account.
* [`katapult_object_storage_bucket`](../resources/object_storage_bucket.md) —
  buckets inside an account.
* [`katapult_object_storage_access_key`](../resources/object_storage_access_key.md)
  — credentials for clients accessing buckets in an account.
